channel.title: TERMINAL on Tejiri Mayone
channel.description: Recent content in TERMINAL on Tejiri Mayone

item.title: Upload Files TO Github Using Bash
item.description: Introduction Bash is a Unix shell and command language written by Brian Fox for the GNU Project as a free software replacement for the Bourne shell. A bash script is a series of commands written in a file. These are read and executed by the bash program. The program executes line by line. Requirement You need to have a beginner knowledge on the following : Text editors (we will be using Visual Studio Code).
